commands: # first create a dispatch claim with the concrete timestamped job name

.venv/bin/python tools/claim_lane_dispatch.py claim --lane-id pr98_channel_ablation_drop_f0_blue_f1_green_t4_replay --platform lightning --instance-job-id exact_eval_pr98_channel_ablation_drop_f0_blue_f1_green_t4_YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ --agent codex:gpt-5.5 --predicted-eta-utc YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ --status active --notes "PR98 channel ablation drop_f0_blue_f1_green; runtime tree d483bd072e62e0770a59e02d5eb9a878ade8516d5a05077cd6912aa586f248b3; archive unchanged"

.venv/bin/python scripts/launch_lightning_batch_job.py exact-eval --state-path .omx/state/lightning_batch_jobs.json --job-name exact_eval_pr98_channel_ablation_drop_f0_blue_f1_green_t4_YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ --archive experiments/results/pr98_channel_ablation_candidates_20260504_codex/archives/pr98_archive.zip --repo-dir /teamspace/studios/this_studio/pact --upstream-dir /teamspace/studios/this_studio/pact/upstream --inflate-sh experiments/results/pr98_channel_ablation_candidates_20260504_codex/runtime_variants/drop_f0_blue_f1_green/inflate.sh --machine T4_SMALL --studio pact --remote-preflight-ssh-target lightning-pact --dispatch-lane-id pr98_channel_ablation_drop_f0_blue_f1_green_t4_replay --expected-archive-sha256 7ecb0df1c4627d55d88e03eff3d890b7a7a5b047c62515acff20232cf29310eb --expected-archive-size-bytes 178392 --source-manifest PATH_TO_LIGHTNING_SOURCE_MANIFEST.json --adjudicate --max-sane-score 1.0 --component-trace
